commands.name: init
commands.about: Detect the project and write a starter `.flux` file

commands.name: build
commands.about: Run the full build pipeline (dependency graph, parallel)

commands.name: test
commands.about: Run the pipeline's test step(s) and their dependencies

commands.name: run
commands.about: Run a single named step (and its dependencies)

commands.name: clean
commands.about: Remove Flux's cache and artifacts

commands.name: info
commands.about: Show what Flux detects about this project

commands.name: ci
commands.about: Run a clean, cache-free CI pipeline and record an artifact

commands.name: deploy
commands.about: Deploy according to the `.flux` deployment block

commands.name: rollback
commands.about: Roll back the latest deployment to the previous release

commands.name: agent
commands.about: Run AI agents (planner, reviewer, tester, maintenance, ...)

commands.name: runners
commands.about: Manage local build runners and declared runner pools

commands.name: project
commands.about: Show repository intelligence: languages, architecture, health

commands.name: ask
commands.about: Ask a question about this repository (offline, or via `ai.command`)

commands.name: github
commands.about: GitHub integration: CI scaffolding, PR review, issue planning

commands.name: docs
commands.about: Regenerate reference docs from the CLI, agents, and knowledge graph

commands.name: dashboard
commands.about: Render a self-contained HTML project dashboard

commands.name: analytics
commands.about: Show build-performance analytics from run history

commands.name: lock
commands.about: Capture the current environment into `.flux.lock`

commands.name: reproduce
commands.about: Compare the current environment against `.flux.lock` (reproducibility)

commands.name: artifact
commands.about: Manage the artifact registry

commands.name: release
commands.about: Create a release from stored artifacts

commands.name: secret
commands.about: Manage encrypted secrets

commands.name: plugin
commands.about: Inspect, install, or scaffold plugins

commands.name: workspace
commands.about: Manage a multi-project workspace

commands.name: policy
commands.about: Check the pipeline against declared policies

commands.name: status
commands.about: A one-screen overview of the project's Flux state

commands.name: graph
commands.about: Print the pipeline dependency graph

commands.name: fmt
commands.about: Format the project with its language formatter

commands.name: lint
commands.about: Lint the project with its language linter

commands.name: changelog
commands.about: Generate a changelog from git commits

commands.name: version
commands.about: Bump the project version (major | minor | patch)

commands.name: deps
commands.about: Inspect project dependencies

commands.name: doctor
commands.about: Diagnose the environment, toolchains, and Flux setup

commands.name: validate
commands.about: Validate the `.flux` file (syntax, pipeline graph, references)

commands.name: verify
commands.about: Run the project's full check suite (fmt, clippy, tests)

commands.name: explain
commands.about: Explain the pipeline in plain language

commands.name: format
commands.about: Canonically format the `.flux` file in place

agents.name: planner
agents.description: Break a feature or issue into an implementation plan

agents.name: reviewer
agents.description: Summarise the current changes and flag review risks

agents.name: tester
agents.description: Find code that lacks test coverage (heuristic)
